use_cases: Displaying category tags or labels on blog posts and articles
Creating navigation filters with clickable badges
Adding metadata labels to cards and list items
Implementing notification counts or badges on UI elements
ai_summary: A reusable badge component with multiple style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) built with Tailwind and class-variance-authority. Designed for displaying short informational labels, tags, or status indicators throughout an application. Clean, minimal styling with hover states makes it suitable for navigation, filtering, and categorization UI patterns.
